title: Ability to Sort List of Teams Alphabetically
excerpt: We have created several Teams in order to keep our users organized, but as the # of teams we create grows, we need the capability to sort our list of teams Alphabetically. Currently it is listing the Teams on the left pa…

posts.author: cdf (Carrie d.)
posts.cookedHtml: We have created several Teams in order to keep our users organized, but as the # of teams we create grows, we need the capability to sort our list of teams Alphabetically. Currently it is listing the Teams on the left panel in the order they were created, but with so many, it’s now getting unwieldy and we need to organize it better.

posts.author: Jocelyne (Jocelyne Leroux)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, the request by CDF would also greatly help our organisation set up with teams, since we have a lot. Thanks for considering
